libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required for basic coverage. Prefer in-process APIs such as MavenCli --version, DefaultRuntimeInformation, diagnoser classes, lifecycle/mapping helpers, and other non-networked Maven core components.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is caused by API/signature drift between 2.0.6 and 2.0.7, especially maven-artifact exception constructors, not by missing setup.
Full Maven build execution can touch local settings, repositories, and networked artifact resolution; avoid relying on that path unless tests explicitly isolate temp directories and offline behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 resolves the Maven 2.x core runtime and its normal transitive dependencies; meaningful in-process coverage is reachable without extra dependencies, Docker services, or required environment/system properties.
